description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard shipping box, commonly used for parcel delivery. The box is sealed with black tape featuring the Amazon Prime branding and has a large, bold black Amazon arrow logo printed on one side. The exterior is light brown corrugated cardboard, with visible creases and minor wear along the edges, suggesting it has been handled. Shipping labels and barcodes are affixed to one side, indicating it has been processed for delivery. The box appears to be empty or lightly filled, as there is no visible bulging or deformation. Its size and markings make it typical for packages left on doorsteps, in mailrooms, or on urban sidewalks.
description: A rectangular Amazon-branded cardboard shipping box sealed with black Prime tape and shipping labels, showing minor wear and clear delivery markings.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the large black Amazon arrow logo on the brown cardboard surface.
description_view_1: The top view shows the black Amazon Prime tape sealing the box and visible shipping labels.
description_view_2: This angled view displays both the Amazon logo and the Prime tape, along with some printed handling instructions.
description_view_3: The end view focuses on the Prime tape running lengthwise and the printed code 'E4' on the box.
